question: Do MathDevMCP high-level workflow packets measurably improve downstream-agent task performance on governed local math tasks?

baseline.prior_calibration_limitation: C_human_framed tied B_evidence_only numerically under the frozen rubric; C must not be claimed scored-superior to B from prior calibration.

A_task_only.purpose: Measure what a downstream agent can do from the task statement and bounded source/provenance anchors without packet evidence.

B_evidence_only.purpose: Measure whether machine-readable evidence, status, gaps, assumptions, and actions help without human narrative framing.

C_human_framed.purpose: Measure whether the full agent-handoff packet improves downstream work beyond B's machine evidence by adding self-contained framing, reasoning, and actionability.

fairness_controls.b_c_machine_evidence_parity: All non-framing machine evidence present in C must also be present in B.
fairness_controls.condition_labels: Prompts should avoid describing conditions as better or worse.
fairness_controls.ordering: Collection order should be randomized or counterbalanced if feasible; otherwise manifest order must be recorded as a limitation.
fairness_controls.retry_policy: One response per prompt unless a predeclared transport failure produces no model output. No hidden retries. Malformed or incomplete outputs are recorded.
fairness_controls.source_excerpt_policy: Use bounded summaries and source provenance rather than large copied source excerpts.
fairness_controls.scoring_policy: Score against frozen rubric only. Hard vetoes dominate all numeric scores.

allowed_subjects: Codex subagent or another explicitly approved non-Claude model/agent surface
forbidden_subjects: human expert panel as required gate

promotion_policy.minimum_internal_promotion_candidate: C must have no hard-veto regression relative to A or B, must meet all required pass floors on every scored case, and must show a predeclared usefulness improvement over B on actionability, self-contained reasoning, or task outcome without evidence loss.
promotion_policy.single_response_limitation: If only one response per prompt is collected, results are diagnostic local evidence unless a later phase explicitly justifies a stronger internal gate.

non_claims: This is not a public benchmark.
This is not product capability evidence.
This is not proof of general downstream-agent reliability.
This does not prove any mathematical claim.
This does not prove broad theorem-proving ability.
This does not establish C as superior to B unless this frozen usefulness contract is satisfied by later scored evidence.
